_meta.notes: Methods (in order of effectiveness) for getting Amex SUB-eligibility past the in-flow popup. Effectiveness shifts as Amex tightens model — re-verify quarterly.

methods.description: Apply via Resy iOS app -> Offers tab, OR via direct Resy email/web link. Different offer ID and routing.
methods.evidence: DPs from FrequentMiler comments + r/churning regularly show Resy bypassing popup AND carrying elevated SUB AND sometimes omitting once-per-lifetime language
methods.downside: Need a Resy account with usage history to receive the offer. Not all users get them.

methods.description: Visit cardmatch.creditcards.com, enter SSN. Targeted offers shown have unique URLs.
methods.evidence: Many DPs of CardMatch Plat / Gold offers bypassing popup; some hit popup anyway
methods.downside: Requires soft-pull SSN check. Not every user is shown Amex offers.

methods.description: Amex sometimes sends targeted email offers explicitly omitting 'have or have had this Card' language. Apply within the email's window (24-72hr typical).
methods.evidence: FrequentMiler covers each major NLL drop. r/churning Amex NLL megathread.
methods.downside: Not predictable. You wait until you receive one.

methods.description: Apply via another user's referral link (spouse, family member). Different routing in some cases.
methods.evidence: Mixed DPs. Sometimes bypasses popup; often does not.
methods.downside: Even when popup bypassed, the offer may carry standard rather than elevated SUB.

methods.description: Apply in private/incognito window not signed into amex.com.
methods.evidence: Most DPs report popup persists across incognito; some report bypass when COMBINED with another method (Resy offer in incognito)
methods.downside: Issuer fraud detection sometimes flags incognito as unusual

methods.description: Some Amex products allow phone or branch application that uses different routing than online.
methods.evidence: Rare DPs of bypass. Most products are online-only at this point.
methods.downside: Limited product availability; CSR cannot manually remove the popup.

what_does_not_work.reason: Popup is server-side per SSN, not client-side.
Application requires SSN + address; mismatched IP triggers fraud check, not bypass.
CSRs explicitly cannot override the bonus eligibility model.
Popup persists. Wait 60-90 days minimum for the model to re-evaluate.

if_you_hit_the_popup: Do NOT submit. Close the application window.
The card will be approved without SUB eligibility if you submit.
Wait 60-90 days minimum before retrying any Amex application.
Use the wait period to wait for Resy / CardMatch / NLL offer.
if_you_already_submitted_and_got_no_sub: The card is approved with no SUB. No way to retroactively earn the SUB.
Decide whether to keep the card for the earning rate alone (often not worth AF).
Closing within 12 months has clawback but if no SUB earned, no claw to back. Safe to close anytime.
Closing too many recently-opened Amex cards can affect future Amex eligibility.
